data.body: Implemented in commit f475365ca (branch worktree-docs+two-vote-gate-sync, Change-Id I5d5f29b3). All AC met: sync.remote config key + _as_git_remote validator + tickets_remote() helper (config.py); threaded through push.py, sync.py, fsck.py, init.py, AND the 5th site repo_snapshot.materialize_tickets (found by plan-review; default-preserving remote param keeps the code-snapshot path unchanged). Docs: CLAUDE.md remotes note + step2->gerrit + store-shares section; docs/config.md sync.remote. Tests: tests/unit/test_sync_remote_config.py (18 pass: config default/env/file/precedence/validation + push git-args spy + real E2E push to a non-origin 'github' bare remote). Default unchanged (origin). Gates: ruff+format+mypy clean; full unit suite 2919 passed / 1 skipped.
